race.comment: It looks a fantastic race for MY GLADIOLA (5) who comes back from the G1 Newmarket Handicap. Things didn't work out there in a messy race, the fresh run when hitting the front before being mowed down by Tentyris in a G1 Lightning is outstanding form for this. Back to 1100m suits better, she gets regular jockey Jamie Mott back aboard and provided she's come through last start well, she's clearly the one to beat. LEGACY BOUND (2) resumed over this track and distance and won well with the big weight. He didn't beat much there but has come back well, just whether staying at 1100m is a little niggle now. Wary of unbeaten filly EDUCATED (10) who was a very smart winner here last time out in good time. She looks right up to this and can improve again. TYCOON STAR (1) has the right form lines last campaign but was just a rung below, MILITARY TYCOON (6) is going okay and is in the mix.
